chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Etiquettes of the Fasting Person, What Invalidates the Fast, and What Does Not Invalidate it

text: 1863 - اَلْحَلَبِيُّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: «إِنَّا إِذَا أَرَدْنَا أَنْ نَحْتَجِمَ فِي شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ اِحْتَجَمْنَا بِاللَّيْلِ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1863 - Al-Halabi narrated from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
"When we wish to perform cupping (hijamah) during the Month of Ramadan, we do it at night."
